result.searchExplanation: I used the provided agent findings indicating the official Cour d'appel d'Aix-en-Provence "Experts judiciaires" page on justice.fr, which links to the official PDF annuaire.
result.dateExtractionExplanation: The authoritative publication date was explicitly identified in the PDF content on page 0 as "December 10, 2025" and converted to ISO format YYYY-MM-DD.

results.agentText:
Voici la **liste officielle des experts judiciaires** de la Cour d’appel d’Aix-en-Provence, trouvée sur le site officiel **justice.fr**. La page « Experts judiciaires » pointe vers l’annuaire PDF officiel intitulé **“Annuaire des experts Décembre 2025”**. ([cours-appel.justice.fr](https://www.cours-appel.justice.fr/aix-en-provence/experts-judiciaires))

- **Cour** : Cour d’appel d’Aix-en-Provence. ([cours-appel.justice.fr](https://www.cours-appel.justice.fr/aix-en-provence/experts-judiciaires))

result.searchExplanation: The official Amiens Court of Appeal page was identified as https://www.cours-appel.justice.fr/amiens. The PDF link provided in the findings points to the official expert list document on the same domain.
result.dateExtractionExplanation: The authoritative date was taken from the PDF content, where the first page explicitly shows 'ARRÊTÉ DU 05 DÉCEMBRE 2022'. This was converted from French date format to YYYY-MM-DD as 2022-12-05. The 2025 year in the filename appears to refer to the file path/name, not the publication date.
